productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women White Core 50 Sports Shoes
description: White and pink shoe with a synthetic upper with a mesh tongue and Adidas 3-Stripe overlays on the midfoot Central lace-ups with a padded tongue and mesh inner Branding on the tongue and heel collar with tough support at the back heel Lightweight rubber midsole TPU outsole with deep flex grooves and circular grooved patterns Impact guidance line along the outsole with a suction point at the big toe region of the outsole
